That's a lot of regulatory noise.

Regulatory & Bill Changes

annually

*Local, State & Federal

Abstract proactively identifies, analyzes and reports how changing regulatory policy impacts your organization.

Local, state and federal, we’ve got you covered with:

Optimized discovery

No more heavy lifting — our suite of AI enabled tools helps you sort, filter, and discover relevant policy at local, state and federal levels.

Exponential intelligence

Refined for your business. Abstract’s AI grows with you, delivering insights tailored to your priorities, goals, and clients.

Collaborative analysis

Sandboxed project environments allowing for joint policy analysis across teams, departments, and regions.

Cut through the noise and tune into what matters

Get Started
